candidate.completion: put me in a group chat so I can be ignored by several people at once.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored by several people at once.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and logically sharp: loneliness becomes the wish to be neglected at scale. "Ignored by several people at once" is the exact comic pivot and carries a real social truth, though the line is a bit long and less elegant than its best idea.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
